Class SoundManager

java.lang.Object
ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.SoundManager
public class SoundManager extends Object
Manages audio playback for the game. This class loads, plays, loops, and stops sound effects and background music.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    BG_MUSIC
    Index for the Background Music clip.
    static final int
    DAMAGE
    Index for the Player Damage sound effect.

    Index for the Game Over sound effect.

    Index for the Healing sound effect.
    static final int
    WINNING
    Index for the Winning sound effect.

    Method
    Description
    void
    loop(int i)
    Plays an audio file continuously on loop.
    void

    Plays a sound effect once.

    Helper function to set the volume for a specific audio file.
    void
    stop(int i)
    Stops playback for a specific audio.
    void
    stopAll()
    Stops all playing audio clips at the moment.

  • Constructor Details

    • SoundManager

      public SoundManager()
      Constructs a new SoundManager. Loads all audio files from the resource folder and also adjusts sound where needed.

  • Method Details

    • setVolume

      public void setVolume(int i, float decibels)
      Helper function to set the volume for a specific audio file.
      Parameters:
      i - The index of the clip.
      decibels - The volume adjustment in decibels.

    • play

      public void play(int i)
      Plays a sound effect once.
      Parameters:
      i - The index of the clip to play.

    • loop

      public void loop(int i)
      Plays an audio file continuously on loop.
      Parameters:
      i - The index of the clip to loop.

    • stop

      public void stop(int i)
      Stops playback for a specific audio.
      Parameters:
      i - The index of the clip to stop.

    • stopAll

      public void stopAll()
      Stops all playing audio clips at the moment.
